metcon.name: CrossFit Games Open 26.3 Scaled (Ages 16-54)
metcon.description:
For Time:
2 Rounds of:
12 burpees over the bar
12 cleans, weight 1
12 burpees over the bar
12 thrusters, weight 1
2 rounds of:
12 burpees over the bar
12 cleans, weight 2
12 burpees over the bar
12 thrusters, weight 2
2 rounds of:
12 burpees over the bar
12 cleans, weight 3
12 burpees over the bar
12 thrusters, weight 3
Time Cap: 16 minutes
F:
45, 55, 65lb (20, 25, 29kg), may step over the barbell
M:
65, 85, 95lb (29, 38, 43kg), may step over the barbell
*If capped, record rep count in the comment box

hypertrophy.reasoning: Today heavily taxed legs, shoulders, and pressing stability; accessory work targets posterior chain and pulling musculature.

siri_text: Saturday's workout. Metcon: CrossFit Games Open 26.3 Scaled (Ages 16-54). For Time, 16 min cap: 12 burpees over the bar, 12 cleans, weight 1, 12 burpees over the bar, 12 thrusters, weight 1, 12 burpees over the bar. For hypertrophy, focus on rear deltoids, back (upper/mid), biceps.
